@metadata.comment: Don't know how often I'll update this top part lol

2faCode: Label for the 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) code input field on the login page.

404.404: Error page title shown when a page is not found (HTTP 404 error).
404.app: Link text on the 404 page pointing to the main application.
404.blog: Link text on the 404 page pointing to the Fermi blog.
404.home: Link text on the 404 page pointing to the homepage.
404.listtitle: Heading on the 404 page above a list of suggested navigation links.
404.login: Link text on the 404 page pointing to the login page.
404.report: Text on the 404 page asking users to report if they found the page within the client.
404.reset: Link text on the 404 page pointing to the password reset page.
404.title: Main heading shown on the 404 error page.
404.whatelse: Easter egg alert message shown randomly when clicking the 'Wherever this is' link on the 404 page. It's meant to be humorous/silly.
404.whereever: Link text on the 404 page that triggers random easter egg events when clicked.

onboarding.name: Settings section title for the guild onboarding feature.
onboarding.disable: Button label to disable the onboarding feature for a guild.
onboarding.addChannel: Button label to add a channel to the onboarding flow.
onboarding.channel: Label for the channel selector in the onboarding settings.
onboarding.desc: Label for the description text input in onboarding settings.
onboarding.deleteChannel: Button label to remove a channel from the onboarding flow.
onboarding.enable: Button label to enable the onboarding feature for a guild.
onboarding.title: Dialog title shown to new members joining a guild. $1 is the guild name.

DMs.add: Context menu item and button label for adding a person to a Direct Message conversation. DM = Direct Message (a private conversation between users).
DMs.close: Context menu item to close/leave a Direct Message conversation.
DMs.copyId: Context menu item to copy the DM channel's ID to the clipboard.
DMs.markRead: Context menu item to mark a DM conversation as read.
DMs.name: Title for the Direct Messages section in the sidebar.

ok: Generic OK button label used to confirm/dismiss dialogs.
dismiss: Button label to dismiss a notification or popup message.
UrlGen: Title for the bot invite URL generator settings section.

Voice.userVol: Label for the slider that controls another user's volume in a voice channel.

status.badWS: Voice connection status message indicating a bad response from the WebSocket. WS = WebSocket, a network protocol used for real-time communication with the server.
status.conectionFailed: Voice connection status message shown when the WebRTC connection fails.
status.done: Voice connection status message shown when successfully connected.
status.left: Voice connection status message shown after leaving a voice chat.
status.makingOffer: Voice connection status message shown while creating a WebRTC offer.
status.noSDP: Voice connection status message when no SDP (Session Description Protocol) is available. SDP is a format for describing multimedia communication sessions.
status.notconnected: Voice connection status message shown when not connected to any voice channel.
status.sendingStreams: Voice connection status message shown while sending audio streams to other users.
status.startingRTC: Voice connection status message shown while starting the RTC (Real-Time Communication) connection. RTC = WebRTC, a technology for real-time audio/video communication.
status.waitingMainWS: Voice connection status message shown while waiting for the main WebSocket connection. WS = WebSocket.
status.waitingURL: Voice connection status message shown while waiting for the voice server URL.
status.wsAuth: Voice connection status message shown while waiting for the WebSocket to authorize. WS = WebSocket.
status.wsOpen: Voice connection status message shown while waiting for the WebSocket to open. WS = WebSocket.

gifSettings.always: Option for GIF/animated icon playback: always animate.
gifSettings.hover: Option for GIF/animated icon playback: only animate on mouse hover.
gifSettings.never: Option for GIF/animated icon playback: never animate.

accessibility.name: Settings section title for accessibility options.
accessibility.playGif: Label for the setting that controls when GIF images are animated.
accessibility.playIcon: Label for the setting that controls when animated icons are played.
accessibility.roleColors: Label for the setting to disable role-based username colors.
accessibility.gradientColors: Label for the setting to disable gradient coloring on roles.
accessibility.decorations: Label for the setting to enable avatar decorations.

accountNotStart: Error message shown on the loading screen when the user account fails to initialize.

applications.delete: Button label to delete an application in the developer portal.
applications.sure: Confirmation message when deleting an application. $1 is the application name.

badge.active_developer: Badge name for an active developer.
badge.application_guild_subscription: Badge text indicating an application has premium features.
badge.automod: Badge text indicating an application uses AutoMod (automatic moderation).
badge.bot_commands: Badge text indicating an application supports slash commands.
badge.bug_hunter_level_1: Badge name for a level 1 bug hunter.
badge.bug_hunter_level_2: Badge name for a level 2 bug hunter.
badge.certified_moderator: Badge name for a certified moderator.
badge.early_supporter: Badge name for an early supporter of the platform.
badge.guild_booster_lvl1: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 1).
badge.guild_booster_lvl2: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 2).
badge.guild_booster_lvl3: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 3).
badge.guild_booster_lvl4: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 4).
badge.guild_booster_lvl5: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 5).
badge.guild_booster_lvl6: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 6).
badge.guild_booster_lvl7: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 7).
badge.guild_booster_lvl8: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild (level 8).
badge.guild_booster_lvl9: Badge name for a user who has boosted a guild for a long time (level 9).
badge.hypesquad: Badge name for a member of Vibesquad (placeholder name for a community group).
badge.hypesquad_house_1: Badge name for Vibesquad house 1: Boldness.
badge.hypesquad_house_2: Badge name for Vibesquad house 2: Excellence.
badge.hypesquad_house_3: Badge name for Vibesquad house 3: Equilibrium.
badge.legacy_username: Badge text indicating the user has a legacy (old-style) username.
badge.partner: Badge name for an instance partner.
badge.premium: Badge name indicating a premium user.
badge.quest_completed: Badge text indicating the user finished a quest.
badge.staff: Badge name for instance staff members.
badge.verified_developer: Badge name for a verified developer.

bio: Label for the bio/about-me text field in user settings.
blankMessage: Placeholder text shown when a message has no content.

blog.blog: Settings section title for the blog feature.
blog.blogUpdates: Label for the toggle to enable/disable blog update notifications.
blog.desc: Description text for the blog settings section.
blog.fermi: Title text for the Fermi blog page.
blog.gotoPost: Button label to navigate to a blog post.
blog.wantUpdates: Prompt asking the user if they want weekly blog update notifications.

bot: Label displayed next to a bot user's name to indicate it is a bot.
botGuilds: Label for a list showing which guilds (servers) the bot is a member of.
botSettings: Title for the bot settings page in the developer portal.
cancel: Generic cancel button label used in dialogs and forms.

channel.SlowmodeCool: Status message showing the slowmode cooldown remaining. $1 is the formatted time remaining.
channel.TimeOutCool: Status message showing when a timeout expires. $1 is the formatted date/time.
channel.allowIcons: Label for the setting that allows custom channel icons.
channel.announcement: Channel type name for announcement channels.
channel.copyId: Context menu item to copy a channel's ID.
channel.copyIdCat: Context menu item to copy a category's ID.
channel.createCatagory: Context menu item to create a new channel category.
channel.createChannel: Context menu item to create a new channel.
channel.creating: Status text shown while a channel is being created.
channel.delete: Context menu item to delete a channel.
channel.deleteCat: Context menu item to delete a category.
channel.icon: Label for the channel icon image input field.
channel.makeInvite: Context menu item to create an invite for the channel.
channel.markRead: Context menu item to mark a channel as read.
channel.mute: Context menu item and dialog title to mute a channel.
channel.name: Channel type name displayed in settings for channel type selection.
channel.name:: Label for the channel name input field in channel settings.
channel.nsfw:: Label for the NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / mature content warning toggle. NSFW = Not Safe For Work.
channel.permissions: Settings section title for channel permissions.
channel.selectCatName: Placeholder/label for the category name input when creating a category.
channel.selectName: Placeholder/label for the channel name input when creating a channel.
channel.selectType: Label for the channel type selector when creating a channel.
channel.settings: Settings section title for channel settings.
channel.settingsFor: Settings dialog title. $1 is the channel name.
channel.slowmode: Label for the slowmode duration setting in channel settings.
channel.text: Channel type name for text channels.
channel.timedOutUntil: Tooltip shown on the timeout icon next to messages. $1 is the formatted date/time string.
channel.topic:: Label for the channel topic input field.
channel.typebox: Placeholder text in the message input box. $1 is the channel name.
channel.unmute: Context menu item to unmute a channel.
channel.voice: Channel type name for voice channels.
channel.deleteThread: Context menu item to delete a thread.
channel.hideThreads: Label for the setting controlling when threads are hidden after inactivity.
channel.forum: Channel type name for forum channels.

threads.leave: Context menu item to leave a thread.
threads.join: Context menu item to join a thread.
threads.name: Label for the thread name input when creating a thread.
threads.editTags: Context menu item and dialog title for editing forum tags on a thread.

forum.creorsear: Placeholder text for the forum search/create input field.
forum.next: Button label to go to the next page of forum posts.
forum.back: Button label to go to the previous page of forum posts.
forum.newPost: Button label to create a new forum post.
forum.post: Button label to submit a new forum post.

sortby.title: Label for the sort-by dropdown in forum sorting options.
sortby.recent: Sort option: sort forum posts by recent activity.
sortby.posted: Sort option: sort forum posts by date posted.

sortOrder.title: Label for the sort order dropdown in forum sorting options.
sortOrder.recent: Sort order option: show recent posts first.
sortOrder.old: Sort order option: show old posts first.

tagMatch.title: Label for the tag matching dropdown in forum sorting options.
tagMatch.some: Tag matching option: show posts matching any of the selected tags.
tagMatch.all: Tag matching option: show posts matching all selected tags.

sortOptions.name: Title for the forum sorting options panel.

errors.tagsReq: Error message shown when trying to create a forum post without selecting required tags.
errors.requireText: Error message shown when trying to create a forum post without message content.

forum.allTags: Button label to show/select all tags in the forum view.

settings.editTags: Label for the tag editing section in forum channel settings.
settings.editTag: Dialog title when editing a single forum tag.
settings.tagName: Label for the tag name input field.
settings.moderated: Label for the checkbox that restricts tag application to thread moderators only.
settings.addTag: Button label to add a new tag to the forum.
settings.delTag: Button label to delete a forum tag.

channelLink: Display text for a channel link in messages. $1 is the channel name. Uses Markdown heading syntax.
clientDesc: About/information text for the client shown in settings. $1 is the version string, $3 is the calculated rights bitmask. Uses Markdown for links.

commands.errorNotValid: Error message for slash commands when an invalid choice is provided. $1 is the value entered, $2 is the option name.
commands.required: Error message for slash commands when a required option is missing. $1 is the option name.

confirmGuildLeave: Confirmation dialog text when leaving a guild. $1 is the guild name.
copyLink: Context menu item to copy a message's link/URL.
copyRegLink: Context menu item to copy a regular link (e.g. invite link).
copymessageid: Context menu item to copy a message's ID.
copyrawtext: Context menu item to copy the raw text content of a message.
createAccount: Button label to create a new account.
deleteConfirm: Generic confirmation message shown when deleting something.

devSettings.badUser: Label for the developer setting to enable logging of bad user objects.
devSettings.cache: Label for the developer setting to enable Service Worker caching of map files.
devSettings.cacheDesc: Description text explaining the cache setting behavior.
devSettings.captureTrace: Description text for the setting that captures _trace properties from the server.
devSettings.clearWellKnowns: Label for the button to re-fetch .well-known records from the server.
devSettings.description: Warning text at the top of the developer settings section advising non-developers not to change these settings.
devSettings.gatewayComp: Label for the developer setting to disable gateway compression.
devSettings.reportSystem: Label for the developer setting to enable the experimental reporting system.
devSettings.logGateway: Label for the developer setting to log received gateway events.
devSettings.name: Settings section title for developer settings.
devSettings.traces: Label for the developer setting to expose server traces.

deviceManage.city: Session info field showing the city. $1 is the city name.
deviceManage.continent: Session info field showing the continent. $1 is the continent name.
deviceManage.country: Session info field showing the country. $1 is the country name.
deviceManage.curSes: Text shown for the current session indicating it cannot be logged out from this menu.
deviceManage.estimateWarn: Warning text that the geolocation information shown is approximate and may be incorrect.
deviceManage.ip: Session info field showing the last known IP address. $1 is the IP address.
deviceManage.last: Session info field showing approximate last usage time. $1 is a date/time string.
deviceManage.latitude: Session info field showing latitude. $1 is the latitude value.
deviceManage.logout: Button label to log out a specific session/device.
deviceManage.longitude: Session info field showing longitude. $1 is the longitude value.
deviceManage.manageDev: Title for the expandable section to manage a specific device/session.
deviceManage.postal: Session info field showing the postal code. $1 is the postal code.
deviceManage.region: Session info field showing the region. $1 is the region name.
deviceManage.title: Settings section title for managing active sessions.

discovery: Label for the guild discovery feature.
dms: Sidebar label for the Direct Messages section, shown above the DM channel list.

emoji.confirmDel: Confirmation message when deleting an emoji.

found.not: Info text shown when an emoji belongs to a guild the user has not joined.
found.other: Info text shown when an emoji is from one of the user's other guilds.
found.private: Info text shown when the guild hosting an emoji cannot be found.
found.this: Info text shown when an emoji is from the current guild.

emoji.from: Label prefix text indicating which guild an emoji is from.
emoji.image:: Label for the image file input when uploading an emoji.
emoji.join: Button label to join the guild that hosts a particular emoji.
emoji.name:: Label for the emoji name input field.
emoji.privateGuild: Text indicating the emoji's source guild is private.
emoji.title: Settings section title for the emoji management page.
emoji.upload: Button label and dialog title for uploading emojis.

emojiSelect: Label for the emoji picker input field.
errorReconnect: Error message shown when the client cannot connect to the server. Uses Markdown (bold). $1 is the number of seconds until the next reconnection retry.
favoriteGifs: Title for the favorited GIFs section in the GIF picker.

folder.color: Label for the folder color picker input.
folder.create: Button/dialog title for creating a new guild folder.
folder.edit: Button/dialog title for editing a guild folder.
folder.name: Label for the folder name input field.

form.captcha: Title/heading shown when a CAPTCHA challenge is required during form submission.

friends.addfriend: Tab button label to open the add-friend form.
friends.addfriendpromt: Label for the text input to add friends by their username.
friends.requestsent: Placeholder text shown in the input after a friend request is successfully sent.
friends.all: Tab button label to show all friends.
friends.all:: Heading text above the list of all friends.
friends.blocked: Tab button label to show blocked users.
friends.blockedusers: Heading text above the list of blocked users.
friends.bu: Short label for a blocked user entry.
friends.discnotfound: Error message when the discriminator part of a username is not provided or invalid.
friends.friendlist: Page title shown in the browser tab when viewing the friend list.
friends.friends: Label for the Friends button in the DM sidebar.
friends.notfound: Error message when a user is not found when trying to add a friend.
friends.online: Tab button label to show online friends.
friends.online:: Heading text above the list of online friends.
friends.pending: Tab button label to show pending friend requests.
friends.pending:: Heading text above the list of pending friend requests.
friends.removeFriend: Context menu item to remove a friend.

goThere: Button label in the external link confirmation dialog to proceed to the URL.
goThereTrust: Button label in the external link confirmation dialog to proceed and trust the domain permanently.
goingToURL: Text in the external link confirmation dialog. $1 is the domain/hostname the link points to.

group.createdm: Button label to confirm creating a group DM.
group.edit: Context menu item and dialog title for editing a group chat.
group.select: Dialog title when selecting friends to add to a group DM.

guild.COMMUNITY: Guild join method option: users must apply to join.
guild.disableInvites: Label for the setting to disable invites for a guild.
guild.DISCOVERABLE: Guild join method option: guild appears in discovery.
guild.INVITES_DISABLED: Guild join method option: invite-only access.

adminMenu.changePerms: Label for the permission selector when searching for admins.
adminMenu.finding: Status text shown while searching for guild admins.
adminMenu.ownName: Label for the guild owner entry in the admin list.
adminMenu.owner: Button label to find the guild owner.
adminMenu.permission: Label for the permissions field in the admin finder.

guild.report: Context menu item to report a guild.
guild.admins: Button label to open the Find Admins feature.
guild.banReason: Text showing the ban reason. $1 is the reason text.
guild.bannedBy: Label preceding the name of the user who issued a ban.
guild.banner:: Label for the guild banner image input.
guild.bans: Settings section title for the guild bans list.
guild.boostMessage?: Label for the setting to send a message when someone boosts the guild.
guild.banId: Button label to ban a user by their ID.
guild.idSel: Label for the ID input field when banning by ID.
guild.community: Settings section title for community guild settings.
guild.confirmDelete: Confirmation message when deleting a guild. $1 is the guild name.
guild.confirmLeave: Confirmation message when leaving a guild.
guild.copyId: Context menu item to copy the guild's ID.
guild.create: Button label to create a guild from scratch.
guild.createFromTemplate: Button label to create a guild from an existing template.
guild.createNewTemplate: Button label to create a new template from the current guild.
guild.creating: Status text shown while a guild is being created.
guild.default: Notification setting: use the guild default. $1 is the default setting name.
guild.defaultNoti: Description for the default notification settings option.
guild.delete: Button label to delete a guild.
guild.description:: Label for the guild description input field.
guild.disoveryTitle: Title of the guild discovery page. $1 is the number of guilds found. Uses {{PLURAL}} for entry/entries.
guild.editingTemplate: Dialog title when editing a template. $1 is the template name.
guild.emptytext: Message body shown when a guild has no channels.
guild.emptytitle: Message title shown when a guild has no channels.
guild.helpTips?: Label for the setting to send helpful tips in the guild.
guild.howJoin: Heading text asking how people can join the guild.
guild.icon:: Label for the guild icon image input.
guild.invites: Settings section title for the guild invites list.
guild.joinConfirm: Confirmation dialog text when joining a guild. $1 is the guild name.
guild.leave: Context menu item to leave a guild.
guild.loadingDiscovery: Loading text shown while discovery results are being fetched.
guild.makeInvite: Button label to create a guild invite.
guild.markRead: Context menu item to mark a guild as read.
guild.memberCount: Text showing the guild member count. $1 is the number of members. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.
guild.mute: Context menu item to mute a guild.
guild.name:: Label for the guild name input field.
guild.nameNoMatch: Error message when the typed guild name doesn't match for deletion confirmation.
guild.noDelete: Button label to cancel guild deletion.
guild.noLeave: Button label to cancel leaving a guild.
guild.notifications: Settings section title for guild notification settings.
guild.onlyMentions: Notification setting: only receive notifications for @mentions.
guild.overview: Settings section title for guild overview.
guild.region:: Label for the guild region selector.
guild.roles: Settings section title for guild roles.
guild.ruleId: Label for the rules channel selector in guild settings.
guild.selectnoti: Label for the notification type selector.
guild.sendrandomwelcome?: Label for the setting to send random welcome messages when someone joins.
guild.serverName: Label for the guild name input when creating a guild.
guild.settings: Context menu item to open guild settings.
guild.settingsFor: Settings page title. $1 is the guild name.
guild.splash: Label for the discovery splash image input.
guild.stickWelcomeReact?: Label for the setting to prompt members to react with a sticker when someone joins.
guild.systemSelect:: Label for the system messages channel selector.
guild.tempCreatedBy: Label showing who created a template.
guild.tempUseCount: Text showing how many times a template has been used. $1 is the use count. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.
guild.template: Label for the template link/code input when creating a guild from a template.
guild.templateDesc: Label for the template description input field.
guild.templateName: Label for the template name input field.
guild.templateNameShort: Error message when a template name is too short.
guild.templateURL: Text showing the template link. $1 is the URL.
guild.templates: Settings section title for guild templates.
guild.templcateMetaDesc: Description text explaining what a guild template includes and excludes.
guild.topic:: Label for the guild topic input field.
guild.unknownRole: Placeholder text for an unresolved/unknown role mention.
guild.viewTemplate: Button label to view a template's details.
guild.yesDelete: Button label to confirm guild deletion.
guild.yesLeave: Button label to confirm leaving a guild.

hideBlockedMessages: Text shown when messages from a blocked user are visible, click to hide them.

home.icon: Alt text for an instance's icon image on the home/login page. $1 is the instance name.
home.uptimeStats: Multiline text showing instance uptime statistics. $1 is all-time uptime %, $2 is weekly uptime %, $3 is daily uptime %.
home.warnOffiline: Warning message shown when the selected instance is offline.

htmlPages.addBot: Button label to add a bot to a guild on the OAuth2 authorization page.
htmlPages.alreadyHave: Link text on the registration page for users who already have an account.
htmlPages.box3description: Description text on the home page for the 'Contribute' section.
htmlPages.box3title: Title on the home page for the 'Contribute' section.
htmlPages.compatableInstances: Label above the list of Harmony-compatible instances on the login/register page.
htmlPages.createAccount: Button label and title for the account creation form.
htmlPages.dobField: Label for the date of birth input field on the registration form.
htmlPages.emailField: Label for the email input field on login and registration forms.
htmlPages.idpermissions: Text shown on the bot authorization page above the list of permissions the bot will have.
htmlPages.instanceField: Label for the instance URL selector on the login/register page.
htmlPages.loaddesc: Subtitle text shown below the loading indicator.
htmlPages.loadingText: Main text shown during application loading.
htmlPages.loginButton: Button label for the login form submit button.
htmlPages.noAccount: Link text on the login page for users who don't have an account, and text shown on invite/template pages when not logged in.
htmlPages.pw2Field: Label for the password confirmation input on the registration form.
htmlPages.pwField: Label for the password input field on login and registration forms.
htmlPages.switchaccounts: Button label to switch between multiple accounts.
htmlPages.trans: Button label linking to the translation page.
htmlPages.transDesc: Description text for the translation contribution section.
htmlPages.transTitle: Title for the translation contribution section.
htmlPages.userField: Label for the username input field on the registration form.
htmlPages.welcomeJank: Welcome heading shown on the home/landing page.

incorrectURLS: Error message shown when an instance returns incorrect API URLs. Uses Markdown for headings and links. Asks the user if Fermi should try to fix the error automatically.
instInfo: Button label to open the instance information dialog.

instanceInfo.contact: Link text to email the instance administrators.
instanceInfo.frontPage: Markdown link to the instance's front page. $1 is the URL. Uses Markdown.
instanceInfo.name: Settings section title for instance information.
instanceInfo.publicUrl: Markdown link to the instance's public URL. $1 is the URL. Uses Markdown.
instanceInfo.tosPage: Markdown link to the instance's Terms of Service page. $1 is the URL. TOS = Terms of Service. Uses Markdown.

instanceStats.members: Instance statistics line showing total members. $1 is the member count.
instanceStats.messages: Instance statistics line showing total messages. $1 is the message count.
instanceStats.name: Title for the instance statistics dialog. $1 is the instance name.
instanceStats.servers: Instance statistics line showing total guilds. $1 is the guild count.
instanceStats.users: Instance statistics line showing total registered users. $1 is the user count.

interactions.ephemeralDismiss: Button label to dismiss an ephemeral (only-you) interaction message.
interactions.failed: Status text shown when a bot interaction fails.
interactions.nonsence: Error message when the server sends an unknown component type. $1 is the unknown type number.
interactions.notImpl: Error message when a component type is not yet implemented. $1 is the component type number.
interactions.onlyYou: Text shown above ephemeral messages indicating only the current user can see it.
interactions.replyline: Text shown in the reply line for interaction responses.
interactions.started: Status text shown while an interaction is being processed.
interactions.worked: Status text shown when an interaction succeeds.

invite.accept: Button label to accept an invite.
invite.alreadyJoined: Text shown when the user has already joined the invited guild.
invite.channel:: Label showing which channel an invite is for.
invite.createInvite: Button label to create/generate an invite link.
invite.createdAt: Text showing when an invite was created. $1 is the formatted date.
invite.expireAfter: Label for the invite expiration time selector.
invite.expires: Text showing when an invite expires. $1 is the expiration date/time or 'Never'.
invite.forChannel: Text showing which channel an invite leads to. $1 is the channel name.
invite.inviteLinkCode: Label for the invite link/code text input.
invite.inviteMaker: Settings section title for the invite creation tool.
invite.invitedBy: Text on the invite page. $1 is the username of the person who invited.
invite.joinUsing: Button/tab label to join a guild using an invite code.
invite.loginOrCreateAccount: Link text on the invite page to login or create an account.
invite.longInvitedBy: Full invite text. $1 is the inviter's username, $2 is the guild name.
invite.maxUses: Text showing the maximum number of times an invite can be used. $1 is the max uses count.
invite.never: Option text for invites that never expire.
invite.noAccount: Text on invite page telling user to create an account to accept.
invite.notFound: Error message when an invite code is invalid or expired.
invite.subtext: Subtitle text below an invite showing the destination. $1 is the channel name, $2 is the guild name.
invite.used: Text showing how many times an invite has been used. $1 is the use count. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.

inviteOptions.limit: Invite max-uses option showing the number of allowed uses. $1 is the number. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.
inviteOptions.noLimit: Invite max-uses option: no usage limit.
inviteOptions.title: Dialog title for the invite creation dialog.

jankInfo: Button label to open the client information dialog in settings.
leaveGuild: Context menu item to leave a guild.
leaving: Dialog title shown when clicking an external link that will navigate away from Harmony.
loaded: Status text shown on the loading screen when the client has finished loading.

localuser.2faCode:: Label for the 2FA code input field in security settings. 2FA = Two-Factor Authentication.
localuser.2faCodeGive: Text showing the user's TOTP secret for 2FA setup. $1 is the secret key. TOTP = Time-based One-Time Password.
localuser.2faDisable: Button label to disable Two-Factor Authentication.
localuser.2faEnable: Button label to enable Two-Factor Authentication.
localuser.CheckUpdate: Button label to check for application updates.
localuser.PasswordsNoMatch: Error message when password and confirmation password don't match.
localuser.TOSURL: Label for the Terms of Service URL field in instance management.
localuser.VoiceWarning: Warning message shown when enabling the experimental voice feature.
localuser.accentColor: Label for the theme accent color picker in appearance settings.
localuser.accountSettings: Settings section title for account settings.
localuser.addBot: Button label to add a bot to an application.
localuser.addStatus: Button label to set a custom status.
localuser.advancedBot: Button label to open advanced bot settings.
localuser.appName: Label for the application name input field in the developer portal.
localuser.areYouSureDelete: Confirmation text for account deletion. $1 is the confirmation phrase the user must type.
localuser.badCode: Error message when an invalid 2FA code is entered.
localuser.badPassword: Error message when an incorrect password is entered.
localuser.botAvatar: Label for the bot avatar image input.
localuser.botInviteCreate: Title for the bot invite creator section.
localuser.botUsername: Label for the bot username input field.
localuser.changeDiscriminator: Button label to change the user's discriminator (the number after the username).
localuser.changeEmail: Button label to change the user's email address.
localuser.changePassword: Button label to change the user's password.
localuser.changeUsername: Button label to change the user's username.
localuser.clearCache: Button label to clear the application cache.
localuser.confirmAddBot: Confirmation message when adding a bot to an application (irreversible action).
localuser.confirmReset: Confirmation message when resetting a bot token.
localuser.confuseNoBot: Error message shown when an application doesn't have a bot associated with it.
localuser.connections: Settings section title for managing external connections/linked accounts.
localuser.createApp: Button label to create a new application in the developer portal.
localuser.customSound: Option name for a custom notification sound.
localuser.customStatusWarn: Warning text that Harmony does not currently display custom statuses.
localuser.deleteAccount: Settings section title for account deletion.
localuser.deleteAccountButton: Button label to initiate account deletion.
localuser.description: Label for the application description text field in the developer portal.
localuser.devPortal: Settings section title for the developer portal.
localuser.disableConnection: Text shown when a connection type has been disabled by the server.
localuser.editingBot: Dialog title when editing a bot. $1 is the bot's username.
localuser.install: Settings section title for the PWA install option.
localuser.installDesc: Description text explaining what installing Fermi as a PWA does.
localuser.installJank: Button label to install Fermi as a Progressive Web App.
localuser.language: Label for the language selector in settings.
localuser.manageBot: Button label to open the bot management interface.
localuser.manageInstance: Settings section title for instance management (admin only).
localuser.mustTypePhrase: Instruction text telling the user they must type a specific phrase to delete their account.
localuser.newDiscriminator: Label for the new discriminator input field.
localuser.newEmail:: Label for the new email input field.
localuser.newPassword:: Label for the new password input field.
localuser.newUsername: Label for the new username input field.
localuser.noToken: Error message when the bot token cannot be saved because it's unknown.
localuser.noUpdates: Message shown when no application updates are available.
localuser.notisound: Label for the notification sound selector.
localuser.oldPassword:: Label for the current/old password input field.
localuser.password:: Label for the password input field in account change dialogs.
localuser.privacyPolcyURL: Label for the privacy policy URL field in instance management.
localuser.appID: Text showing the application ID. $1 is the ID.
localuser.showSecret: Button label to reveal the client secret.
localuser.clientSecret: Text showing the client secret. $1 is the secret value.
localuser.publicAvaliable: Label for the checkbox to make a bot publicly inviteable.
localuser.refreshPage: Text telling the user to refresh the page to apply changes.
localuser.requireCode: Label for the checkbox requiring OAuth2 code grant to invite a bot.
localuser.resetToken: Button label to reset a bot's token.
localuser.saveToken: Label for the checkbox to save the bot token to local storage.
localuser.setUp2fa: Dialog title for 2FA setup. 2FA = Two-Factor Authentication.
localuser.setUp2faInstruction: Instruction text explaining how to set up 2FA with a TOTP app. TOTP = Time-based One-Time Password.
localuser.sillyDeleteConfirmPhrase: {{doc-important|This is a silly phrase the user must type to confirm account deletion. Do not translate this directly; make a joke that is easy to type in your language.}}
localuser.soundTooLarge: Error message when an uploaded notification sound file is too large.
localuser.status: Settings section title for user status settings.
localuser.team:: Label for the team field in application settings.
localuser.themesAndSounds: Settings section title for themes and sounds.
localuser.tokenDisplay: Text showing a bot token. $1 is the token value.
localuser.trace: Settings section title for viewing server traces.
localuser.trusted: Settings section title for managing trusted domains.
localuser.trustedDesc: Description text explaining what trusted domains are and how they work. Uses Markdown (bold/italic).
localuser.updateSettings: Settings section title for update/service worker settings.
localuser.updatesYay: Message shown when application updates are found.
localuser.userSettings: Settings section title for the user's public profile.

login.allGood: Status text shown when an instance URL has been validated successfully.
login.checking: Status text shown while verifying an instance URL.
login.enterPAgain: Label for the password confirmation input on the password reset form.
login.invalid: Error message when an instance URL is invalid.
login.login: Login form title and submit button label.
login.newPassword: Label for the new password input on the password reset form.
login.pasteInfo: Label for the recovery link input on the password reset form.
login.recover: Link text to navigate to the forgotten password page.
login.recovery: Title for the forgotten/reset password page.
login.waiting: Status text shown before instance URL validation begins.

error.cancel: Button label to cancel logout after an error.
error.cont: Button label to force remove the account after a logout error.
error.desc: Text shown when logout fails, asking if the user wants to remove the account locally.
error.title: Dialog title when a logout error occurs.

manageInstance.AreYouSureStop: Confirmation message when stopping an instance.

TokenFormats.JSON: Token output format option: JSON formatted.
TokenFormats.URLs: Token output format option: as invite links.
TokenFormats.plain: Token output format option: plain text.

manageInstance.clientURL: Label for the client URL input when generating registration tokens.
manageInstance.copy: Button label to copy generated tokens to clipboard.
manageInstance.count: Label for the token count input (how many tokens to generate).
manageInstance.create: Button label to generate the registration tokens.
manageInstance.createTokens: Button label and section title for the registration token creation tool.
manageInstance.format: Label for the token output format selector.
manageInstance.genericType: Registration token type option: generic type.
manageInstance.length: Label for the token length input.
manageInstance.regType: Label for the registration token link type selector.
manageInstance.stop: Button label to stop the instance.

media.artist: Media info field showing the artist. $1 is the artist name.
media.composer: Media info field showing the composer. $1 is the composer name.
media.download: Button label to download a media file.
media.length: Media info showing duration. $1 is the number of minutes, $2 is the number of seconds.
media.loading: Text shown while media is loading.
media.moreInfo: Button label to show more information about a media file.
media.notFound: Error message when a media file cannot be found.

member.ban: Dialog title when banning a member. $1 is the username, $2 is the guild name.
member.kick: Dialog title and context menu item when kicking a member. $1 is the username, $2 is the guild name.
member.nick:: Label for the nickname input field.
member.persist: Label for the option to only delete the user (not their messages) when banning.
member.reason:: Label for the reason input field when banning/kicking.
member.timeout: Dialog title when timing out a member. $1 is the username.
member.timeoutTime: Label for the timeout duration selector.

message.messages: Link text showing the number of messages in a thread. $1 is the message count. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.
message.andMore: Text appended to a list of reaction users indicating there are more. $1 is the truncated list.
message.attached: Short text indicating a message contains an attachment (shown in notifications/previews).
message.delete: Context menu item to delete a message.
message.report: Context menu item to report a message.
message.deleted: Username placeholder text for a deleted message.
message.edit: Context menu item to edit a message.
message.edited: Text appended to edited messages showing they were modified.
message.fullMessage: Label shown above the full message content in a detail view.
message.pin: System message shown when a user pins a message. $1 is used as a split marker for the username.
message.thread: System message shown when a user creates a thread. $1 is used as a split marker for the username, $2 for the thread name.
message.reactedWith: Tooltip text showing what emoji was used to react. $1 is the emoji name.
message.reactionAdd: Context menu item to add a reaction to a message.
message.createThread: Context menu item to create a thread from a message.
message.threadOptions: Dialog title for thread creation options.
message.reactions: Context menu item to view all reactions on a message.
message.reactionsTitle: Dialog title for the reactions viewer.
message.retry: Context menu item to retry sending a failed message.
message.viewrest: CSS-injected text for a button to view the rest of a long message.

report.back: Button label to go back to the previous step in the report flow.
report.next: Button label to proceed to the next step in the report flow.
report.cancel: Button label to cancel the report.
report.submit: Button label to submit the report.
report.blockUser: Button label to block the reported user.
report.timeout: Button label to timeout the reported member.
report.summary: Label for the report summary section.

messageLink: Display text for a message link embed showing which channel it's from. $1 is the channel name.
muteDuration: Label for the mute duration selector when muting a channel.
nevermind: Generic button label to cancel an action.
noEmojiFont: Option label to use the system's built-in emoji font instead of a custom one.
noMessages: Placeholder text shown in an empty channel with no messages.
noPins: Placeholder text shown when a channel has no pinned messages.
noStickers: Placeholder text shown when no stickers are available to use.
notiClump: Notification body text when multiple notifications are grouped. $1 is the notification count, $2 is the channel name.
notiVolume: Label for the notification volume slider.
otherAt: Date/time format for messages older than yesterday. $1 is the formatted date, $2 is the formatted time.

descriptions.ADMINISTRATOR: Permission description for the Administrator permission. Warns about its danger.
descriptions.MANAGE_GUILD: Permission description for managing guild settings.
descriptions.VIEW_AUDIT_LOG: Permission description for viewing the audit log.
descriptions.VIEW_CREATOR_MONETIZATION_ANALYTICS: Permission description for viewing monetization analytics.
descriptions.VIEW_GUILD_INSIGHTS: Permission description for viewing guild insights/statistics.
descriptions.BYPASS_SLOWMODE: Permission description for bypassing channel slowmode.
descriptions.MANAGE_NICKNAMES: Permission description for managing other members' nicknames.
descriptions.MANAGE_MESSAGES: Permission description for managing (deleting) other users' messages.
descriptions.CREATE_EVENTS: Permission description for creating scheduled events.
descriptions.CREATE_GUILD_EXPRESSIONS: Permission description for creating expressions. The soundboard is a feature that lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
descriptions.MANAGE_GUILD_EXPRESSIONS: Permission description for managing expressions. The soundboard is a feature that lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
descriptions.MODERATE_MEMBERS: Permission description for timing out guild members.
descriptions.MOVE_MEMBERS: Permission description for moving members between voice channels.
descriptions.MUTE_MEMBERS: Permission description for muting members in voice channels.
descriptions.DEAFEN_MEMBERS: Permission description for deafening members. To deafen means to disable both incoming and outgoing audio in a voice channel.
descriptions.CHANGE_NICKNAME: Permission description for changing own nickname.
descriptions.VIEW_CHANNEL: Permission description for viewing text channels.
descriptions.READ_MESSAGE_HISTORY: Permission description for reading message history.
descriptions.SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS: Permission description for sending messages in threads.
descriptions.SEND_TTS_MESSAGES: Permission description for sending text-to-speech messages. TTS = Text-To-Speech.
descriptions.USE_EXTERNAL_EMOJIS: Permission description for using emojis from other guilds.
descriptions.USE_EXTERNAL_STICKERS: Permission description for using stickers from other guilds.
descriptions.SEND_VOICE_MESSAGES: Permission description for sending voice messages.
descriptions.CREATE_PUBLIC_THREADS: Permission description for creating public threads.
descriptions.CREATE_PRIVATE_THREADS: Permission description for creating private threads.
descriptions.CONNECT: Permission description for connecting to voice channels.
descriptions.SPEAK: Permission description for speaking in voice channels.
descriptions.USE_VAD: Permission description for Voice Activity Detection. VAD = Voice Activity Detection, which allows speaking without pressing a Push-To-Talk key.
descriptions.STREAM: Permission description for streaming in voice channels.
descriptions.USE_SOUNDBOARD: Permission description for using the soundboard. The soundboard lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
descriptions.USE_EXTERNAL_SOUNDS: Permission description for using soundboard sounds from other guilds. The soundboard lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
descriptions.PRIORITY_SPEAKER: Permission description for being a priority speaker in voice channels.
descriptions.REQUEST_TO_SPEAK: Permission description for requesting to speak in stage channels.
descriptions.USE_EMBEDDED_ACTIVITIES: Permission description for using embedded activities.
descriptions.USE_APPLICATION_COMMANDS: Permission description for using application/slash commands.
descriptions.USE_EXTERNAL_APPS: Permission description for using external applications publicly.

readableNames.ADD_REACTIONS: Permission name for adding reactions to messages.
readableNames.ADMINISTRATOR: Permission name for the administrator permission.
readableNames.CHANGE_NICKNAME: Permission name for changing own nickname.
readableNames.CONNECT: Permission name for connecting to voice channels.
readableNames.CREATE_GUILD_EXPRESSIONS: Permission name for creating expressions (emojis, stickers, soundboard sounds).
readableNames.CREATE_PRIVATE_THREADS: Permission name for creating private threads.
readableNames.CREATE_PUBLIC_THREADS: Permission name for creating public threads.
readableNames.DEAFEN_MEMBERS: Permission name for deafening members. To deafen means to disable both incoming and outgoing audio in a voice channel.
readableNames.MANAGE_GUILD: Permission name for managing the guild.
readableNames.MANAGE_GUILD_EXPRESSIONS: Permission name for managing expressions (emojis, stickers, soundboard sounds).
readableNames.MODERATE_MEMBERS: Permission name for timing out members.
readableNames.MOVE_MEMBERS: Permission name for moving members between voice channels.
readableNames.MUTE_MEMBERS: Permission name for muting members in voice channels.
readableNames.PRIORITY_SPEAKER: Permission name for priority speaker in voice channels.
readableNames.READ_MESSAGE_HISTORY: Permission name for reading message history.
readableNames.REQUEST_TO_SPEAK: Permission name for requesting to speak in stage channels.
readableNames.SEND_MESSAGES_IN_THREADS: Permission name for sending messages in threads.
readableNames.SEND_TTS_MESSAGES: Permission name for sending Text-To-Speech messages. TTS = Text-To-Speech.
readableNames.SEND_VOICE_MESSAGES: Permission name for sending voice messages.
readableNames.SPEAK: Permission name for speaking in voice channels.
readableNames.STREAM: Permission name for streaming video in voice channels.
readableNames.USE_APPLICATION_COMMANDS: Permission name for using application/slash commands.
readableNames.USE_EMBEDDED_ACTIVITIES: Permission name for using embedded activities.
readableNames.USE_EXTERNAL_APPS: Permission name for using external applications.
readableNames.USE_EXTERNAL_EMOJIS: Permission name for using emojis from other guilds.
readableNames.USE_EXTERNAL_SOUNDS: Permission name for using soundboard sounds from other guilds. The soundboard lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
readableNames.USE_EXTERNAL_STICKERS: Permission name for using stickers from other guilds.
readableNames.USE_SOUNDBOARD: Permission name for using the soundboard. The soundboard lets you play short audio clips in voice channels.
readableNames.USE_VAD: Permission name for Voice Activity Detection. VAD = Voice Activity Detection, allowing speaking without Push-To-Talk.
readableNames.VIEW_AUDIT_LOG: Permission name for viewing the audit log.
readableNames.VIEW_CREATOR_MONETIZATION_ANALYTICS: Permission name for viewing creator monetization analytics.
readableNames.VIEW_GUILD_INSIGHTS: Permission name for viewing guild insights.

pinMessage: Context menu item to pin a message.

profile.bio: Label for the about-me section on a user's profile.
profile.joined: Profile info showing when the account was created. $1 is the formatted date.
profile.joinedMember: Profile info showing when the user joined a specific guild. $1 is the guild name, $2 is the formatted date.
profile.mut: Tab label for the mutual guilds section on a user's profile.
profile.mutFriends: Tab label for the mutual friends section on a user's profile.
profile.permInfo: Tab label for the permissions section on a user's profile.
profile.userInfo: Tab label for the user info section on a user's profile.
profile.notes: Tab label for the user notes section on a user's profile.

profileColor: Label for the profile accent color picker.
pronouns: Label for the pronouns input field in profile settings.
readableName: {{doc-important|This should be the name of the language you are translating into, in that language. Please DO NOT translate this into your language's word for "English"!}}
recentEmoji: Title for the recent/frequently used emojis section in the emoji picker.

register.DOBError: Registration form field label with error. $1 is the error message for date of birth.
register.agreeTOS: Checkbox label for agreeing to the Terms of Service. $1 is the TOS URL. Uses Markdown for the link. TOS = Terms of Service.
register.emailError: Registration form field label with error. $1 is the error message for email.
register.noTOS: Checkbox label shown when the instance has no Terms of Service.
register.passwordError:: Registration form field label with error. $1 is the error message for password.
register.register: Button label and page title for the registration form.
register.tos: Error message when the user hasn't agreed to the Terms of Service. TOS = Terms of Service.
register.usernameError: Registration form field label with error. $1 is the error message for username.
register.other: Option label to connect to a different (non-listed) instance.
register.instURL: Label for the custom instance URL input field.

renderJoinAvatars: Label for the setting to display avatars for new member join messages.
reply: Context menu item to reply to a message.
replyingTo: Text shown above the message input indicating who is being replied to. $1 is the username.
retrying: Status text shown while retrying a failed connection.

role.color: Label for the primary role color picker.

colors.name: Label for the role color scheme selector.
colors.secondColor: Label for the second color picker in a multi-color role.
colors.thirdColor: Label for the third color picker in a multi-color role.

role.confirmDelete: Confirmation message when deleting a role. $1 is the role name.
role.copyId: Context menu item to copy a role's ID.
role.delete: Button label and context menu item to delete a role.
role.deleting: Status text shown while a role is being deleted.
role.displaySettings: Button label to open role display settings (hoisting, color, icon).
role.hoisted: Label for the setting to display role members separately in the member list.
role.mentionable: Label for the setting to allow anyone to mention/ping the role.
role.name: Label for the role name input field.
role.perms: Section title for role permissions (shown when editing channel overrides).
role.remove: Context menu item to remove a role from a user.
role.roleEmoji: Label for the role emoji input field.
role.roleFileIcon: Label for the role icon image input field.
role.roles: Section title for roles list (shown in guild settings).

search.back: Button label to go to the previous page of search results.
search.new: Button label to sort search results by newest first.
search.next: Button label to go to the next page of search results.
search.nofind: Message shown when no search results are found.
search.old: Button label to sort search results by oldest first.
search.page: Text showing the current search results page number. $1 is the page number.
search.search: Placeholder text for the search input field.
search.settings: Button label and dialog title for search filter settings.
search.before: Label for the 'before date' filter in search settings.
search.after: Label for the 'after date' filter in search settings.
search.includensfw: Label for the checkbox to include NSFW channels in search. NSFW = Not Safe For Work.
search.authors: Label for the authors filter in search settings.
search.mentions: Label for the mentions filter in search settings.
search.channels: Label for the channels filter in search settings.

searchGifs: Placeholder text for the GIF search input. $1 is the GIF provider name (e.g. 'Tenor').

settings.clear: Button label to clear/remove an uploaded image.
settings.img: Button label to upload an image.
settings.save: Button label to save changes in settings.
settings.unsaved: Warning text shown when the user has unsaved changes.

serviceWorkerMode.offlineOnly: Service Worker mode option: only cache for offline use.
serviceWorkerMode.title: Label for the Service Worker mode selector.
serviceWorkerMode.unregistered: Service Worker mode option: fully disabled including media cache.

showBlockedMessages: Text shown to reveal hidden messages from a blocked user. $1 is the number of blocked messages. Uses {{PLURAL}} for singular/plural.
spoiler: Label for the spoiler button/overlay on spoiler-tagged content.

sticker.confirmDel: Confirmation message when deleting a sticker.
sticker.del: Button label to delete a sticker.
sticker.desc: Label for the sticker description input field.
sticker.errEmjMust: Error message when no emoji is paired with a sticker upload.
sticker.errFileMust: Error message when no image is included for a sticker upload.
sticker.image: Label for the sticker image file input.
sticker.name: Label for the sticker name input field.
sticker.tags: Label for the associated emoji input for a sticker.
sticker.title: Settings section title for sticker management.
sticker.upload: Button label and dialog title for uploading stickers.

submit: Generic submit button label used in forms.
switchAccounts: Button label to switch between multiple logged-in accounts.
todayAt: Date format for messages sent today. $1 is the formatted time.

trace.totalTime: Trace timing display. $1 is the time in milliseconds, $2 is the trace name.
trace.traces: Trace entry display. $1 is the trace name, $2 is the time in milliseconds, $3 is additional info.

typing: Typing indicator text. $1 is the number of people typing, $2 is the names of the people typing separated by commas. Uses {{PLURAL}} for is/are.
unableToConnect: Error message shown when the client cannot connect to the Harmony server.
unableToPin: Error message shown when pinning/unpinning a message fails.

sbWarns.regi: Warning shown when registering on a Spacebar instance, recommending Harmony instead. Asks for confirmation to continue.
sbWarns.in: Warning shown once when logging into a Spacebar instance, recommending Harmony instead.

connections.since: Text showing when the user became a member of a connected service. $1 is the formatted date.
connections.display: Label for the toggle to display a connection on the user's profile.
connections.delete: Button label to delete/remove a connection.
connections.sure: Confirmation dialog title when deleting a connection.
connections.sureDesc: Confirmation dialog description text warning that removing a connection is irreversible.

unpinMessage: Context menu item to unpin a message.
updateAv: Notification text indicating application updates are available.
uploadBanner: Label for the banner image upload input.
uploadFilesText: Placeholder text in the file upload area.
uploadPfp: Label for the avatar/profile picture upload input.
useTemplate: Text on the template page indicating which template will be used. $1 is the template name.
useTemplateButton: Button label to use a template to create a guild.
usedFermi: Context menu item text indicating a message was sent via the Fermi client.

user.report: Context menu item to report a user.
user.deleted: Placeholder name shown for a deleted user.
user.reportApp: Context menu item to report an application/bot.
user.addRole: Context menu item to add roles to a member.
user.ban: Context menu item to ban a member.
user.block: Context menu item to block a user.
user.confirmInstBan: Confirmation message when instance-banning a user. $1 is the username.
user.copyId: Context menu item to copy a user's ID.
user.dnd: User status option: Do Not Disturb.
user.editNick: Context menu item to edit a member's nickname.
user.editServerProfile: Context menu item and settings title to edit the guild-specific profile.
user.friendReq: Context menu item to send a friend request.
user.instanceBan: Context menu item to instance-ban a user (admin action).
user.kick: Context menu item to kick a member.
user.message: Context menu item to send a direct message to a user.

nick.foe: Context menu item to set a nickname for a blocked user.
nick.friend: Context menu item to set a nickname for a friend.
nick.stalker: Context menu item to set a nickname for someone who sent a friend request.
nick.stalking: Context menu item to set a nickname for someone you sent a friend request to.

user.remove: Context menu item to remove a user (from a role list).
user.removeRole: Context menu item to remove roles from a member.
user.sendMessage: Placeholder text for the message input on a user's profile popup. $1 is the username.
user.timeout: Context menu item to timeout a member.
user.unTimeout: Context menu item to remove a timeout from a member.
user.unban: Button label to unban a user. $1 is the username.
user.unblock: Context menu item to unblock a user.
user.viewProfile: Context menu item to view a user's full profile.

userping.resolving: Placeholder text shown while resolving a user mention.
userping.unknown: Placeholder text for an unresolved/unknown user mention.

vc.joinForStream: Text telling users to join the voice channel to watch a stream.
vc.joiningStream: Status text shown while connecting to watch a stream.
vc.joinstream: Button label to start watching a user's stream.
vc.leavestream: Button label to stop watching a stream.
vc.stopstream: Button label to stop your own stream.

webauth.addKey: Button label to add a new security key for WebAuthn authentication.
webauth.keyname: Label for the security key name input field.
webauth.manage: Button label to open the security key management interface.

webhook: Label displayed next to a webhook message author to indicate it is a webhook.

webhooks.EnterWebhookName: Dialog title prompting the user to name a new webhook.
webhooks.areYouSureDelete: Confirmation message when deleting a webhook. $1 is the webhook name.
webhooks.avatar: Label for the webhook avatar section.
webhooks.channel: Label for the webhook output channel selector.
webhooks.copyURL: Button label to copy the webhook's URL.
webhooks.createdAt: Text showing when a webhook was created. $1 is the formatted date.
webhooks.createdBy: Label showing who created the webhook.
webhooks.deleteWebhook: Button label to delete a webhook.
webhooks.name: Label for the webhook name input field.
webhooks.newWebHook: Button label to create a new webhook.
webhooks.notFound: Text shown when the webhook creator is no longer in the guild.
webhooks.sillyDefaults: {{doc-important|This is just a list of silly default names for webhooks, do not feel the need to translate directly, and no need for the same count.}}
webhooks.token: Text showing the webhook token. $1 is the token value. Uses Markdown (backticks for code).
webhooks.type: Text showing the webhook type. $1 is the type name.
webhooks.type1: Webhook type name: Incoming (receives data from external sources).
webhooks.type2: Webhook type name: Channel follower (cross-posts from another channel).
webhooks.type3: Webhook type name: Application (managed by a bot/app).
webhooks.url: Text showing the full webhook URL. $1 is the URL. Uses Markdown (backticks for code).

welcomeMessages: {{doc-important|These are welcome messages sent when someone joins a guild. They are meant to be silly. You do not need to translate them directly; there may be a different count of messages, but only include the username ($1) once per message.}}
widget: Settings section title for the guild widget.
widgetEnabled: Label for the checkbox to enable/disable the guild widget.
yesterdayAt: Date format for messages sent yesterday. $1 is the formatted time.
